description_long: This is a red aluminum can featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding in bold white script, prominently displayed on one side. The can is cylindrical with a slightly tapered top and bottom, and a silver pull-tab opening at the top. One side of the can displays a stylized white Coca-Cola bottle silhouette filled with repeated Coca-Cola script, while the opposite side contains detailed nutritional information, recycling symbols, and a barcode. The can's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The overall design is highly recognizable and associated with carbonated soft drinks. The can is likely filled with a carbonated beverage, making it lightweight and easy to carry.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with bold white branding, a stylized bottle graphic, and detailed nutritional labeling. The can is sleek, cylindrical, and highly recognizable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola script logo on a red background.
description_view_1: Side view featuring a white stylized Coca-Cola bottle graphic composed of script text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying nutritional information, recycling symbols, and a barcode.
description_view_3: Side view with another white stylized Coca-Cola bottle graphic, similar to view 1.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is prominently displayed in white script on the front and as a repeated script within a bottle silhouette on the sides. The logo is large, curvy, and highly recognizable, with dominant colors of white on a red background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic flavor, but no explicit flavor text is visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the can, including a nutrition facts panel, recycling symbols, and a barcode.
